summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Agile Ortho Homepage Redesign (Iteration 25). All 16 backend tests passed. All 10 homepage sections verified: Utility bar, Hero (with 2 CTAs), Trust metrics (SKUs/10 Divisions/33 Districts/24/7), Who We Serve (5 cards), Product Divisions (10 divisions with counts), Why Agile Ortho, Featured Products (8 products from 8 different divisions), How Ordering Works (4 steps), Compliance Band, Final CTA (3 buttons). Admin dashboard shows correct lead counts (11 hot, 7 warm, 5 cold). Featured products API returns diverse products from multiple divisions.

homepage_sections: ✓ Section 1: Utility bar with phone and WhatsApp links
✓ Section 2: Hero with buyer-focused headline and 2 CTAs (Browse Product Divisions + Request Bulk Quote)
✓ Section 3: Trust metrics strip (814+ SKUs, 10 Divisions, 33 Districts, 24/7 Supply)
✓ Section 4: Who We Serve with 5 cards (Hospitals, Clinics, Diagnostic Centers, OT Teams, Procurement Teams)
✓ Section 5: Product Divisions showing 10 divisions with product counts
✓ Section 7: Featured Products showing 8 products from diverse divisions
✓ Section 8: How Ordering Works with 4 steps
✓ Section 9: Compliance Band with trust badges
✓ Section 10: Final CTA with 3 buttons (Request Bulk Quote, WhatsApp, Call Now)
featured_products_api: Returns products from 8 different divisions (Cardiovascular, Critical Care, Diagnostics, ENT, Endo-surgical, Infection Prevention, Orthopedics, Peripheral Intervention)
divisions_api: Expected divisions present: Orthopedics, Cardiovascular, Diagnostics, ENT, Endo-surgical, Infection Prevention, Critical Care, Peripheral Intervention, Urology, Robotics
admin_dashboard: Dashboard shows correct lead counts: 11 hot, 7 warm, 5 cold (case-insensitive query working)
Products by division chart shows all 10 divisions

critical_code_review_comments: Homepage redesign successfully implements trust+conversion-first approach with 10 well-structured sections
Featured products API correctly picks one product per division that has an image, ensuring diversity
Admin stats endpoint uses case-insensitive query for lead scores ($in: ['hot', 'Hot']) - working correctly
Division cards correctly link to /products?division=DivisionName with URL encoding
Manrope font and dark navy hero with teal accents properly implemented
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 verified complete homepage redesign with 10 sections. Key endpoints: /api/products/featured/homepage (returns diverse products from different divisions), /api/divisions (returns 10 divisions with counts), /api/admin/stats (returns lead counts with case-insensitive scoring). Homepage uses Manrope font, dark navy hero (#0f172a), teal accents. All division cards link to /products?division=DivisionName. Admin dashboard at /admin shows correct hot/warm/cold lead counts.

verified_features.hero_ctas: Browse Product Divisions + Request Bulk Quote buttons working
verified_features.who_we_serve: 5 cards for Hospitals, Clinics, Diagnostic Centers, OT Teams, Procurement Teams
verified_features.product_divisions: 10 division cards with product counts, links to filtered products page
verified_features.final_cta: 3 buttons: Request Bulk Quote, WhatsApp Specialist, Call Now
verified_features.products_page: 814 products, division filter, product detail navigation
